column1: # Custom partition table for 16MB flash with OTA support (ESP32-S3)
# - Dual OTA partitions (3 MB each) for safe firmware updates
# - LittleFS storage partition (~9.8 MB) for pad configs and future use
# SPIFFS subtype (used by LittleFS on ESP32).
# - Offsets (except nvs/otadata) must be aligned to 0x10000 (64KB)
# - The FQBN option `PartitionScheme=ota_3mb_16MB` must match this filename (without .csv)
